message:
bd-1e2if.2: add golden checksum JSON artifact and GOLDEN_UPDATE workflow

- Extract golden checksums from inline registry to artifacts/golden_checksums.json
- Support GOLDEN_UPDATE=1 env var to regenerate checksums on behavioral changes
- Add GoldenChecksumFile/GoldenEntry structs with schema_version, git_sha, timestamp
- Load from JSON file with fallback to inline registry for backward compatibility
- Add 4 new golden scenarios: budget/combine_chain, budget/deadline_check_matrix,
  obligation/send_permit_lifecycle, obligation/region_cancel_propagation
- Total: 14 golden checksums across 6 subsystems (scheduler, channel, cancel, lab,
  budget, obligation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"bd-1tiq","title":"[AA][Sched] Work‑stealing with deterministic fallback","description":"## Goal
Design a multi‑queue or work‑stealing scheduler that preserves determinism when required.

## Why
We want throughput without sacrificing replayability. Deterministic mode must be preserved.

## Deliverables
- Work‑stealing design with deterministic fallback.
- Contention analysis + fairness metrics.
- Benchmarks for throughput scaling.

## Acceptance
- Throughput improves under multi‑core workloads.
- Deterministic mode remains bit‑for‑bit reproducible.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CloudyReef","created_at":"2026-02-03T00:08:16.838624341Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T12:15:56.486469385Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T12:15:56.486400457Z","close_reason":"Work-stealing with deterministic fallback fully implemented: ThreeLaneWorker has batch work-stealing via DetRng, SchedulerMode::Deterministic + ScheduleCertificate for reproducibility, cancel-lane preemption with bounded fairness (PreemptionMetrics), 140 scheduler tests pass, benchmarks confirm throughput scaling.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1tiq","depends_on_id":"bd-1iva","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:22Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1tiq","depends_on_id":"bd-37l1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:22Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1tiq","depends_on_id":"bd-3nod","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:22Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ufh","title":"Review bd-1l7k perf changes for correctness/regression","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldDune","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:46:12.562051235Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T15:33:22.525112801Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T15:33:22.525037101Z","close_reason":"Review complete: no regressions found","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["performance","raptorq","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ufh","depends_on_id":"bd-1l7k","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:48Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1usdh","title":"[FOUNDATION] franken_kernel crate — Suite-Wide Type Substrate","description":"Implement the franken_kernel crate that defines canonical types used across ALL FrankenSuite projects: TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion, and the Cx type. No other crate may define competing versions. This is the suite workspace architecture's foundation — dependency firewall rule: /dp/* crates depend on franken_kernel, not the reverse. Build-time enforcement: CI fails if any crate defines forked types.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:21:51.516645669Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T09:21:51.516645669Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["foundation","franken-kernel","types"]}
-{"id":"bd-1usdh.1","title":"[FOUNDATION] Define canonical TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion types","description":"Define the canonical identifier and version types for the franken_kernel crate. These types are used across ALL FrankenSuite projects for cross-project tracing, decision logging, and schema compatibility. TraceId: 128-bit unique identifier (UUIDv7 format for time-ordered generation), implements Display, FromStr, Serialize, Deserialize, Hash, Eq, Ord. DecisionId: 128-bit identifier linking a runtime decision to its EvidenceLedger entry, same trait implementations. PolicyId: identifies a decision policy (scheduler, cancellation, budget), includes version for policy evolution tracking. SchemaVersion: semantic version (major.minor.patch) with compatibility checking -- SchemaVersion::is_compatible(other) returns true iff major versions match. All types must be: (1) Copy (128-bit fits in registers), (2) Send + Sync (safe for cross-thread use), (3) no_std compatible (usable in embedded contexts), (4) Zero-cost abstraction over [u8; 16]. TRACING / LOGGING SPECIFICATION: Span: franken_kernel::type_init (one-time at crate init). DEBUG: type constructed with value -- emitted only when debug_assertions enabled. WARN: SchemaVersion::is_compatible() returned false -- signals schema migration needed. INFO: TraceId::new() at trace propagation boundaries only. Metrics: trace_id_generation_rate (counter), schema_version_compat_check_total (counter), schema_version_compat_failure_total (counter). All metrics exposed via metrics crate with prometheus-compatible naming.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:22:00.814450673Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:31.684358037Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["foundation","franken-kernel","types"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:36Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1usdh.1","title":"[FOUNDATION] Define canonical TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion types","description":"Define the canonical identifier and version types for the franken_kernel crate. These types are used across ALL FrankenSuite projects for cross-project tracing, decision logging, and schema compatibility. TraceId: 128-bit unique identifier (UUIDv7 format for time-ordered generation), implements Display, FromStr, Serialize, Deserialize, Hash, Eq, Ord. DecisionId: 128-bit identifier linking a runtime decision to its EvidenceLedger entry, same trait implementations. PolicyId: identifies a decision policy (scheduler, cancellation, budget), includes version for policy evolution tracking. SchemaVersion: semantic version (major.minor.patch) with compatibility checking -- SchemaVersion::is_compatible(other) returns true iff major versions match. All types must be: (1) Copy (128-bit fits in registers), (2) Send + Sync (safe for cross-thread use), (3) no_std compatible (usable in embedded contexts), (4) Zero-cost abstraction over [u8; 16]. TRACING / LOGGING SPECIFICATION: Span: franken_kernel::type_init (one-time at crate init). DEBUG: type constructed with value -- emitted only when debug_assertions enabled. WARN: SchemaVersion::is_compatible() returned false -- signals schema migration needed. INFO: TraceId::new() at trace propagation boundaries only. Metrics: trace_id_generation_rate (counter), schema_version_compat_check_total (counter), schema_version_compat_failure_total (counter). All metrics exposed via metrics crate with prometheus-compatible naming.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:22:00.814450673Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:56:06.739679698Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["foundation","franken-kernel","types"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:36Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1usdh.2","title":"[FOUNDATION] Define canonical Cx type for suite-wide use","description":"Define the canonical Cx (capability context) type in franken_kernel for suite-wide use. Cx is the core abstraction that threads through all Asupersync operations -- it carries capabilities, budget, deadline, trace context, and evidence ledger reference. The franken_kernel Cx must be: (1) Generic over capability set -- Cx<C: CapabilitySet> so each project defines its own capabilities, (2) Lifetime-bound -- Cx<'a, C> ensures capabilities cannot outlive their scope, (3) Propagation-aware -- child Cx inherits parent capabilities (attenuated via Macaroons), (4) Budget-aware -- carries remaining budget in tropical semiring (min, +), (5) Trace-aware -- carries TraceId for cross-project distributed tracing. Must define the CapabilitySet trait with methods: has<T>(), get<T>(), attenuate<T>(caveat). This is the most critical type in the entire FrankenSuite. TRACING / LOGGING SPECIFICATION: Span: cx::new with parent_trace_id, budget_remaining_ms, capability_count. Span: cx::propagate when creating child Cx from parent. DEBUG: Cx<C> created with trace_id={id}, budget={budget_ms}ms, capabilities=[{cap_names}]. DEBUG: Cx attenuated: capability={cap_name}, caveat={caveat_desc}. INFO: Cx budget exhausted: trace_id={id}, original_budget={orig}ms, elapsed={elapsed}ms -- emitted once per exhaustion event. WARN: Cx capability check failed: trace_id={id}, required={cap_name}, available=[{available_caps}]. Metrics: cx_creation_total (counter), cx_propagation_total (counter), cx_budget_exhaustion_total (counter), cx_capability_check_total (counter by result=granted|denied), cx_budget_remaining_ms (histogram at propagation boundaries).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:22:12.440993822Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:00:47.828752761Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cx","foundation","franken-kernel"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:39Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1usdh.3","title":"[FOUNDATION] Implement build-time enforcement for type uniqueness","description":"Implement build-time enforcement that prevents any FrankenSuite crate from defining types that compete with franken_kernel canonical types. This prevents the forked types anti-pattern where multiple crates define their own TraceId, leading to conversion overhead and confusion. Implementation approaches: (1) CI lint: A custom clippy-like lint (or script) that scans all crate sources for struct definitions named TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion, or Cx, and fails if found outside franken_kernel, (2) Workspace-level cargo deny: Use cargo-deny to enforce that only franken_kernel exports these type names, (3) Documentation: Add clear comments in franken_kernel explaining that these types are canonical and MUST NOT be forked. Acceptance criteria: A PR that adds struct TraceId to any crate other than franken_kernel is rejected by CI with a clear error message. TRACING / LOGGING SPECIFICATION: INFO: type uniqueness check passed -- scanned {crate_count} crates, found 0 forks. ERROR: type fork detected in crate {crate_name}: found competing definition of {type_name} at {file}:{line}. WARN: type re-export detected in crate {crate_name} -- re-exports are allowed but should use pub use franken_kernel::{type_name}. Metrics: type_fork_scan_duration_ms (histogram), type_fork_count (gauge, target: 0), crates_scanned_total (counter). CI integration: scan runs as a pre-merge check, logs results as structured JSON to CI artifact directory.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:22:23.529057799Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:00.836990578Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","enforcement","foundation","franken-kernel"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:10Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:10Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:10Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1usdh.4","title":"[FOUNDATION] Unit and integration tests for franken_kernel crate","description":"Comprehensive test suite for the franken_kernel crate (TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion, Cx type).

**Unit tests:**
(1) TraceId UUIDv7 ordering — generate 10,000 TraceIds in sequence; verify they are monotonically ordered (UUIDv7 encodes timestamp in the high bits).
(2) TraceId roundtrip — Display -> FromStr roundtrip for random TraceIds; verify equality. Also test Serialize -> Deserialize roundtrip.
(3) DecisionId/PolicyId parity — same roundtrip and ordering tests as TraceId (shared underlying [u8; 16] representation).
(4) SchemaVersion compatibility — verify is_compatible() returns true for same major version, false for different major version. Test edge cases: 0.x vs 0.y, pre-release versions.
(5) SchemaVersion ordering — verify Ord implementation matches semver ordering (1.0.0 < 1.0.1 < 1.1.0 < 2.0.0).
(6) Copy semantics — verify all types are Copy by passing by value twice without clone (compile-time check via trybuild).
(7) Send + Sync — verify all types are Send + Sync (compile-time check).
(8) no_std compatibility — verify crate compiles with no_std (conditional compilation test).
(9) Cx generic capability set — verify Cx<C> works with custom CapabilitySet implementations; test has<T>(), get<T>(), attenuate().
(10) Cx lifetime safety — verify that Cx<'a, C> cannot outlive its scope (compile-fail test via trybuild).
(11) Cx budget propagation — verify that child Cx inherits parent budget in tropical semiring (min, +); test budget exhaustion.
(12) Cx trace propagation — verify that child Cx inherits parent TraceId for distributed tracing.

**Integration tests:**
(13) Cross-crate type uniqueness — create a mock workspace with a crate that imports franken_kernel types; verify the types are usable and no forking occurs.
(14) Cx capability attenuation chain — create a capability, attenuate it 10 times with increasingly restrictive caveats; verify that authority monotonically decreases.
(15) Cx with EvidenceLedger — verify that Cx carries an evidence_ledger reference and entries can be emitted through it.

**Property-based tests (proptest):**
(16) All identifier types: Hash consistency — if a == b then hash(a) == hash(b) for random pairs.
(17) SchemaVersion: transitivity of is_compatible().
(18) Cx budget: tropical semiring laws (associativity of min, commutativity of min, identity element).

**Logging requirements:**
- Each test logs: test_name, type_under_test, assertion_count, execution_time_us.
- On failure, log the specific input that caused the assertion failure with full Debug output.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All roundtrip properties hold for 10,000 random inputs.
- All compile-fail tests produce clear, understandable error messages.
- Tropical semiring laws hold for 100,000 random budget values.
- Cx lifetime safety is enforced at compile time (no runtime checks needed).

**Rust implementation notes:**
- Use proptest for all random generation with custom strategies for each type.
- Use trybuild for compile-fail and compile-pass tests.
- Use tempfile for no_std compilation tests (cargo build with custom target).
- Tests must be runnable with both std and no_std configurations.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:22:11.959293410Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T17:22:42.941834446Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["foundation","franken-kernel","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:43Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:43Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:43Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1usdh.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1usdh.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:30:43Z","created_by":"import"}]}
